systemicity: Systemic (nutrient uptake through leaves and roots)
mode_of_action_summary: Balanced NPK fertilizer with high potassium content improves plant metabolism, enhances fruit quality, strengthens plant structure, and increases resistance to stress. Nitrogen supports vegetative growth, phosphorus aids root and flower development, and potassium improves yield and quality.

active_ingredients.name: Nitrogen (N)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Supports vegetative growth and chlorophyll formation

active_ingredients.name: Potassium (K2O)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Improves fruit quality, stress tolerance, and disease resistance

urdu: پھل کا سائز چھوٹا رہ جاتا ہے
پتے کمزور اور زرد ہو جاتے ہیں

application_details.method: Dissolve in water and apply as foliar spray or through drip irrigation
application_details.coverage: Ensure uniform application on foliage or soil

resistance_management.advantage: Improves plant strength and stress tolerance

farmer_benefits: پھل بڑا تے وزنی ہو جاندا اے
فصل دی کوالٹی بہتر ہوندی اے

multilingual_description.english: High potassium water-soluble fertilizer for improved fruit quality and yield.
multilingual_description.urdu: زیادہ پوٹاش والی پانی میں حل ہونے والی کھاد جو پھل کی کوالٹی بہتر بناتی ہے۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: وڈی پوٹاش والی پانی چ حل ہون والی کھاد جو پھل دی کوالٹی بہتر کردی اے۔

embedding_text: Super K 5 15 45 is a water soluble fertilizer containing nitrogen phosphorus and high potassium used for improving fruit size quality and yield in crops. It is applied during flowering and fruit development stages.
